'wp-admin/includes/image.php'; function alaska_sideload($url, $post_id, $desc) { $id = media_sideload_image($url, $post_id, $desc, 'id'); if (!is_wp_error($id)) set_post_thumbnail($post_id, $id); return $id; } $cat1 = wp_insert_term('City Break', 'destination_category'); $cat2 = wp_insert_term('European Getaway', 'destination_category'); $cat3 = wp_insert_term('Island Paradise', 'destination_category'); $d1 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'San Francisco', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination', 'post_excerpt' => 'Explore the Golden Gate City with nonstop flights from Seattle.')); update_post_meta($d1, 'destination_route', 'Flights from Seattle'); update_post_meta($d1, 'destination_price', '$129*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat1)) wp_set_object_terms($d1, $cat1['term_id'], 'destination_category'); alaska_sideload('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501594907352-04cda38ebc29?w=800&q=80', $d1, 'San Francisco'); $d2 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Paris', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination', 'post_excerpt' => 'Experience the City of Light with partner flights from the West Coast.')); update_post_meta($d2, 'destination_route', 'Partner flights from SEA'); update_post_meta($d2, 'destination_price', '$645*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat2)) wp_set_object_terms($d2, $cat2['term_id'], 'destination_category'); alaska_sideload('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502602898657-3e91760cbb34?w=800&q=80', $d2, 'Paris'); $d3 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Maui', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination', 'post_excerpt' => 'Escape to paradise with direct flights from Portland.')); update_post_meta($d3, 'destination_route', 'Flights from Portland'); update_post_meta($d3, 'destination_price', '$389*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat3)) wp_set_object_terms($d3, $cat3['term_id'], 'destination_category'); alaska_sideload('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542259009477-d625272157b7?w=800&q=80', $d3, 'Maui'); ?>

'Alaska Airlines Announces New Nonstop Routes to Latin America', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post', 'post_content' => '

SEATTLE — Alaska Airlines is expanding its footprint in Latin America with three new nonstop routes connecting major West Coast hubs to sought-after destinations in Mexico and Central America.

Starting this winter, Alaska will launch service from Seattle-Tacoma International Airport (SEA) and Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) to new tropical gateways. These additions reinforce the airline commitment to providing guests with more premium options for leisure travel.

Connecting the West Coast to the World

We are thrilled to give our guests more reasons to pack their bags and explore the beauty of Latin America, said Andrew Harrison, executive vice president and chief commercial officer.

', 'post_excerpt' => 'Beginning this winter, Alaska Airlines will expand its reach across the Americas with three new international destinations.')); $img1 = media_sideload_image('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1436491865332-7a61a109db05?w=1200&q=80', $p1, 'Aircraft over mountains', 'id'); if (!is_wp_error($img1)) set_post_thumbnail($p1, $img1); $p2 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Redefining Premium: Our New Cabin Interiors are Here', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post', 'post_content' => '

Discover the inspiration behind our new seats, featuring recycled materials and increased legroom across all cabins. Alaska Airlines has partnered with leading designers to create a cabin experience that feels spacious, modern, and distinctly West Coast.

', 'post_excerpt' => 'Discover the inspiration behind our new seats, featuring recycled materials and increased legroom.')); $img2 = media_sideload_image('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540339832862-474599807836?w=1200&q=80', $p2, 'Aircraft cabin interior', 'id'); if (!is_wp_error($img2)) set_post_thumbnail($p2, $img2); $p3 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Path to Net Zero: Annual Sustainability Report Released', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post', 'post_content' => '

Alaska Airlines reaches key milestones in sustainable aviation fuel procurement and waste reduction goals. The airline has committed to net-zero carbon emissions by 2040, ahead of the industry target.

', 'post_excerpt' => 'Alaska Airlines reaches key milestones in sustainable aviation fuel procurement and waste reduction.')); $img3 = media_sideload_image('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497436072909-60f360e1d4b1?w=1200&q=80', $p3, 'Sustainability landscape', 'id'); if (!is_wp_error($img3)) set_post_thumbnail($p3, $img3); ?>
